one_time_description: Quote-part du bénéfice net de Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. recognized for first time under modified equity method (change in accounting policy applied prospectively without restatement); also $2,750,949 management fees receivable from Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. recognized in investing activities
economic_notes: Band owns Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. (hotel/resort), 9417-6831 Québec inc., 9101-2658 Québec inc. (Résidence au Soleil Levant), 9323-8996 Québec inc. (Traiteur W), and 51% of 9395-5458 Québec inc. (Abaziak Construction). Online casino revenue of $500,000. Fitness centre/pool operations. Carrefour Wôlinak inc. fully consolidated.
notes: Audit qualified on three grounds: (1) 9101-2658 Québec inc. (Résidence au Soleil Levant) and 9323-8996 Québec inc. (Traiteur W) not consolidated but should be under PSAS; (2) change in accounting policy for Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. and 9417-6831 Québec inc. applied prospectively without restatement contrary to PSAS (adjustment of -$995,742 booked in current year); (3) SP 3280 asset retirement obligations not assessed. Only Carrefour Wôlinak inc. is fully consolidated. Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. generated very large equity pickup ($4,745,003) and $2,750,949 management fees recognized in investing. ISC and government transfer breakdowns not separately extractable from the text provided. Restricted cash includes SCHL replacement reserve $264,880, fiduciary fund $11,718, and bond investments $3,000,000. Financial statements prepared for SAC reporting purposes. Accumulated surplus shown is total consolidated (Conseil $12,964,226 + Carrefour Wôlinak $1,142,675 = $14,106,901).
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
